other_findings.finding: Fb1 (F1) is the dominant fibroblast population in healthy human adult skin
All three fibroblast subsets express ECM-related genes including MMP2, COL1A1, COL1A2 and NT5E

evidence_quotes.quote: Three fibroblast subsets expressing extracellular matrix (ECM)-related genes such as MMP2, COL1A1, COL1A2 and NT5E (encodes CD73) are present in healthy human skin, dominated by Fb1 fibroblasts with minor populations of Fb2 and Fb3 fibroblasts
